name: migration-upgrade
description: Safe migration/upgrade pattern: backward compatibility, rollback plan, incremental rollout.
steps: Document what is changing and why (old behavior → new behavior)
Check if the change is backward compatible — can old and new coexist?
If breaking: plan a migration path (dual-write, feature flag, versioned API)
Implement the change behind a feature flag or compatibility layer
Test with both old and new data/clients
Plan rollback: what happens if the migration fails halfway?
